text:
(In reply to Robert Clausecker from comment #3)

Thanks. 

If it saves you effort: there's very recent armv7-specific fallout (URL adapted from the uppermost fallout icon at <https://www.freshports.org/www/qt5-webengine/>) – I should have thought of this before my question in comment 2 …
